title: autobench.improver.reasoning v1
description: Improver deliberation capture — verbatim prompt, raw LLM response, parsed delta, and parse status for every improver call. Source: /autobench.

model.description: Improver model identifier (e.g. minimax-m2.7, anthropic-sonnet-4, rule_based)

prompt.description: The diagnosis prompt sent to the model (verbatim).

raw_response.description: Verbatim model output. For rule-based: 'matched strategy: <name>'.

parsed_delta.description: ImprovementDelta fields as parsed from the response.

parse_status.description: Outcome of parsing the model output.

fallback_reason.description: Why we fell back (HTTP error, parse error, etc.).
